description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit a project inquiry for an early-stage copper exploration scoping study in Peru with an estimated budget under $300,000, selecting at least three scoping-related services.

tasks.instruction: Compare at least two gold exploration support packages that all include drill program design and start a contact request for the one with the lower total price.

target_names: Gold RC Drilling Support - Core Package

tasks.instruction: Add the first three lithium case studies in Australia completed in 2021 or later to your shortlist and then view the shortlist page.

tasks.instruction: From the team directory, save to your contacts a senior-level consultant with at least 15 years’ experience on porphyry copper projects in Chile and then start a contact request to them.

tasks.instruction: Register for the earliest upcoming webinar about resource estimation scheduled within the next 90 days and, if multiple time slots are offered, choose a morning session.

tasks.instruction: Use the drilling budget estimator to calculate a 5,000-meter reverse circulation program in Canada that stays under a $750,000 budget and email the estimate summary to yourself.

tasks.instruction: From the downloads area, download and save to your library one geophysics services brochure and one environmental or ESG services brochure.

tasks.instruction: Using the custom bundle builder, create a bundle with exactly three services—one mapping-focused, one geophysics-focused, and one data-analytics-focused—so that the total estimated duration is under 6 months and total cost is under $500,000, then submit it for review.
